entries.answer: Analysis state is synthetic_demo. 6 map units and 6 law records are represented in the current artifact.
entries.title: Analysis status

entries.answer: Tiers are neutral model-score bands for review prioritization, not legal rankings or findings.
entries.title: Tier meaning

entries.answer: The current ontology has 25 nodes and 18 edges.
entries.title: Ontology scope

entries.answer: Grok can be used only by offline analysis jobs with GROK_API_KEY in GitHub secrets or local env; the key is never shipped to Pages.
entries.title: Grok integration policy
